semantic_anchor: That's an ongoing research area that I think will also be very useful for this, because you probably don't, by default, know what data to use for these types of tasks. Any more questions? And this problem, this long context, really arises because we're trying to find the workarounds, which in turn is because the old rules of machine learning dictate that we can't change the model ways at test time

speaker_collisions.title: [2512.23675] End-to-End Test-Time Training for Long Context
speaker_collisions.snippet: End-to-End Test-Time Training for Long Context. Authored by Arnuv Tandon, Karan Dalal, ..., Yu Sun. Long-context language modeling as a problem in continual learning rather than architecture design; the model continues learning at test time via next-token prediction on the given context. For 3B mode
